notes: This registry declares tasks the repo dispatcher is allowed to run.
The dispatcher rejects undeclared task names.
Commands are intentionally simple and repo-local.
Schema version 1.1 added the first RTG cell-geometry smoke test layer.
Schema version 1.2 added provisional RTG function-class behavior tests.
Schema version 1.3 added provisional RTG coupling translation tests.
Schema version 1.4 added provisional RTG shell-role expectation tests.
Schema version 1.5 adds provisional RTG dark-cell color emergence tests.

tasks.name: fixture_smoke_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG fixture shape and allowed values.

tasks.name: cell_geometry_smoke_tests
tasks.description: Validate first provisional RTG cell-geometry invariants.

tasks.name: function_class_behavior_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG function-class behavior profiles.

tasks.name: coupling_translation_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG translated coupling effects between cells.

tasks.name: shell_role_expectation_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG s/p/d/f shell-role behavior expectations.

tasks.name: dark_cell_color_emergence_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG dark-cell color emergence behavior.

tasks.name: dispatcher_self_check
tasks.description: Validate dispatcher registry shape and unknown-task rejection.
